name: url
label: URL
help: Public YouTube video URL, e.g. https://youtube.com/watch?v=ID.

name: language
label: Language
help: Preferred caption language as an ISO code, e.g. "en". Defaults to auto-detect.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Responses are cached for 24 hours by default. Set false to bypass the cache and always fetch fresh data (default true).
